title: Banjo-Kazooie Introduction Theme on Mario Paint Composer
description:
This is the song that plays in the introduciton scene to the classic N64 game, Banjo-Kazooie (the one where they all play the instruments). It was an excellent game. If you liked Super Mario 64 or Donkey Kong 64 (or anything else of that genre) this is a must-play. Buy an old cartridge on eBay. The sequel Banjo-Tooie is also very fun, though I suggest playing the first one first.

This is one of the best video game songs ever in my opinion (or at least one of the catchiest). I fantasized as a young child being able to play this on an instrument but since it requires like 10 or more instruments that never happened (plus it's kinda difficult).

When I went to see if I could do it on MPC it worked very well and I am very satisfied with the end result.

I put more effort into the transition between clips in this one. I also used a different video recorder (Camstudio). I like it better (but it was a pain to set up). Please enjoy!

Software used:
Music: Mario Paint Composer - http://www.unfungames.com/mariopaint/

Notation: MidiNotate Player - http://www.notation.com/MidiNotatePlayer.htm

Video: Camstudio 2.5 Beta - http://camstudio.org/

All free, legal, and unlimited.
